scripts.format: prettier --write --ignore-unknown package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml prettier.config.mjs overture-next web site
scripts.format:check: prettier --check --ignore-unknown package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml prettier.config.mjs overture-next web site
scripts.verify: pnpm format:check && pnpm --filter @overture/tool verify && pnpm --filter @overture/web verify
